Tool Call: retrieve("Chi-square test qualitative vs quantitative")

Based on the gathered evidence:
The Chi-square test specifically deals with qualitative data, examining categorical variables and determining relationships among them. There isn't mention of the test being applied directly to quantitative data or continuous measurements. Instead, examples focus on binary choices (like yes/no responses) or categorizations (such as male/female genders). Hence, my agreement aligns perfectly with option \(A\) stating that the Chi-square test measures qualitative data.

Based on the gathered evidence:
The Chi-square test specifically deals with qualitative data, examining categorical variables and determining relationships among them. There isn't mention of the test being applied directly to quantitative data or continuous measurements.
